netflix.name: Netflix
netflix.gotchas: Will offer discounted plan. Viewing history saved 10 months.

spotify.name: Spotify
spotify.cancel_steps: Account → Subscription → Change plan → Cancel Premium
spotify.gotchas: Keeps your playlists. Reverts to free tier with ads.

hulu.name: Hulu
hulu.cancel_steps: Account → Cancel → Continue to Cancel → Yes Cancel
hulu.gotchas: May offer pause instead of cancel. Access until period ends.

disney_plus.name: Disney+
disney_plus.gotchas: Check if part of a bundle (Hulu/ESPN+) first.

hbo_max.name: Max (HBO)
hbo_max.gotchas: May be bundled through cable provider — check there first.

apple.name: Apple (iCloud/Apple One)
apple.cancel_steps: Settings → [your name] → Subscriptions → select sub → Cancel
apple.gotchas: Apple.com/bill covers iCloud, Apple One, Apple TV+, Music, Arcade — check which.

amazon_prime.name: Amazon Prime
amazon_prime.cancel_steps: Account → Prime Membership → Manage → End Membership
amazon_prime.gotchas: Offers partial refund if unused. Losing free shipping + Prime Video.

youtube_premium.name: YouTube Premium
youtube_premium.cancel_steps: Settings → Purchases and memberships → Manage → Deactivate
youtube_premium.gotchas: Also cancels YouTube Music if bundled. Family plan cancels for everyone.

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT Plus
chatgpt.gotchas: Reverts to free tier. Conversation history preserved.

claude.name: Claude Pro
claude.gotchas: Reverts to free tier with limited usage.

microsoft_365.name: Microsoft 365
microsoft_365.gotchas: Lose 1TB OneDrive storage. Download files first. Office apps revert to read-only.

adobe_cc.name: Adobe Creative Cloud
adobe_cc.cancel_steps: Plans → Manage Plan → Cancel Plan → Choose reason → Confirm
adobe_cc.gotchas: Annual plans have 50% early termination fee on remaining months.

dropbox.name: Dropbox
dropbox.gotchas: Files over 2GB free limit may become inaccessible. Download first.

github.name: GitHub
github.gotchas: Private repos become limited. Actions minutes reduced.

nordvpn.name: NordVPN
nordvpn.gotchas: 30-day money-back guarantee on annual plans. Access continues until period ends.

notion.name: Notion
notion.gotchas: Free tier has block limits. Export your workspace first if large.

figma.name: Figma
figma.cancel_steps: Settings → Account → Plan → Downgrade to Starter
figma.gotchas: Team files become view-only on free tier.

zoom.name: Zoom
zoom.gotchas: Reverts to 40-min meeting limit on free tier.

duolingo.name: Duolingo Plus
duolingo.gotchas: Streak and progress preserved on free tier.

grammarly.name: Grammarly
grammarly.gotchas: Annual plan: no partial refunds. Free tier still catches basic errors.

headspace.name: Headspace
headspace.gotchas: Some free content remains. Cancel through App Store/Play Store if subscribed there.

calm.name: Calm
calm.gotchas: Lifetime deal sometimes available. Check if employer offers free access.

paramount_plus.name: Paramount+
paramount_plus.gotchas: Sometimes bundled with Walmart+ — check there first.

peacock.name: Peacock
peacock.gotchas: Some content free with ads on free tier.

crunchyroll.name: Crunchyroll
crunchyroll.gotchas: Free tier has ads but still has content access.

linkedin_premium.name: LinkedIn Premium
linkedin_premium.gotchas: InMail credits expire. Profile badge removed. Will offer discount to stay.

audible.name: Audible
audible.gotchas: Keep purchased audiobooks forever. Unused credits lost. Will offer 3 months at $7.95.

siriusxm.name: SiriusXM
siriusxm.cancel_steps: Must call 1-866-635-2349 or chat — no self-service cancel online
siriusxm.gotchas: Notoriously hard to cancel. Be firm. Say 'cancel' not 'thinking about it'. They will offer discounts.

planet_fitness.name: Planet Fitness
planet_fitness.cancel_steps: Must cancel in person at home club OR send certified letter. Cannot cancel online or by phone.
planet_fitness.gotchas: Requires 30-day notice. Annual fee may still apply. In-person or certified mail only.

peloton.name: Peloton
peloton.gotchas: App membership vs. All-Access membership are different. Hardware financing continues regardless.

canva.name: Canva Pro
canva.gotchas: Lose access to premium templates and Brand Kit. Download designs first.
